sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ الْهَوَاتِفُ الذَّكِيَّةُ مُهِمَّةً جِدًّا فِي حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pametni telefoni se smatraju veoma važnim u našem svakodnevnom životu.
sentences.translationEn: Smartphones are considered very important in our daily lives.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَسْتَخْدِمُهَا لِلتَّوَاصُلِ مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ وَالْعَائِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Koristimo ih za komunikaciju s prijateljima i porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: We use them to communicate with friends and family.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يُمْكِنُنَا تَصَفُّحُ الْإِنْتِرْنِتِ وَتَعَلُّمُ أَشْيَاءَ جَدِيدَةٍ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Također možemo pretraživati internet i učiti nove stvari svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: Also, we can browse the internet and learn new things every day.
